title: S3 Consistency & Performance
description: Analyze the S3 Read-After-Write consistency model and its implications for data access patterns. Implement prefix-based scaling strategies to maximize request throughput for high-concurrency S3 object access.
objectives: Analyze the S3 Read-After-Write consistency model and its implications for data access patterns.
Implement prefix-based scaling strategies to maximize request throughput for high-concurrency S3 object access.
